languages.text: "Манипулус внес изменения в корабельных сервиторов, отличающиеся от стандартно допустимых их конструкцией. Приведенные им доводы святотатственные, результаты кощунственные, а речи профанные".

"The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."
languages.original_text: "Манипулус внес изменения в корабельных сервиторов, отличающиеся от стандартно допустимых их конструкцией. Приведенные им доводы святотатственные, результаты кощунственные, а речи профанные".

traits.locale_text: "Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from their constructionally permissible standards. The arguments he has presented are blasphemous, the results are heretical, and his speech is profane."

"Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from their constructionally permissible standards. The arguments he has presented are blasphemous, the results are heretical, and his speech is profane."

"The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

"The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

languages.text: «El manipulus ha modificado los servidores de la nave de formas que no cumplen los estándares establecidos para su construcción. Los argumentos que alega son herejes, los resultados blasfemos y sus palabras impías»,
languages.original_text: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

traits.locale_text: «El manipulus ha modificado los servidores de la nave de formas que no cumplen los estándares establecidos para su construcción. Los argumentos que alega son herejes, los resultados blasfemos y sus palabras impías»,

languages.text: « Le manipulus a modifié les servitors du vaisseau de manière non conforme. Les arguments qu'il a avancés pour sa défense sont de l'ordre de l'hérésie, les résultats sont blasphématoires et son discours est profane. »
languages.original_text: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

traits.locale_text: « Le manipulus a modifié les servitors du vaisseau de manière non conforme. Les arguments qu'il a avancés pour sa défense sont de l'ordre de l'hérésie, les résultats sont blasphématoires et son discours est profane. »

languages.text: “操纵者改造舰船机仆的方式偏离标准。其论点属异端，结果为亵渎，言辞更是不堪入耳。”
languages.original_text: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

traits.locale_text: “操纵者改造舰船机仆的方式偏离标准。其论点属异端，结果为亵渎，言辞更是不堪入耳。”

languages.text: "Der Manipulus hat die Servitoren des Schiffes in einer Weise modifiziert, die von den zulässigen Standards ihrer Konstruktion abweicht. Die von ihm vorgebrachten Argumente sind ketzerisch, die Ergebnisse blasphemisch und seine Worte gottlos."
languages.original_text: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

traits.locale_text: Der Manipulus hat die Servitoren des Schiffes in einer Weise modifiziert, die von den zulässigen Standards ihrer Konstruktion abweicht. Die von ihm vorgebrachten Argumente sind ketzerisch, die Ergebnisse blasphemisch und seine Worte gottlos.

languages.text: "Manipülus, geminin hizmetörlerini yapımları için izin verilen standartlardan sapacak şekilde değiştirdi. Sunduğu argümanlar kâfirce, sonuçlar küfür niteliğinde ve söylemleri de saygısızca."
languages.original_text: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

traits.locale_text: "Manipülus, geminin hizmetörlerini yapımları için izin verilen standartlardan sapacak şekilde değiştirdi. Sunduğu argümanlar kâfirce, sonuçlar küfür niteliğinde ve söylemleri de saygısızca."

languages.text: 「マニピュルスは、艦のサーヴィターを、その製造に関して許容される基準から逸脱した形で改造しました。彼が提示した論拠は異端的であり、その結果は冒涜的であり、その物言いは不敬です」
languages.original_text: "The Manipulus has modified the ship's servitors in ways that deviate from the permissible standards for their construction. The arguments he has presented are heretical, the results are blasphemous, and his speech is profane."

traits.locale_text: 「マニピュルスは、艦のサーヴィターを、その製造に関して許容される基準から逸脱した形で改造しました。彼が提示した論拠は異端的であり、その結果は冒涜的であり、その物言いは不敬です」
